interactions.raw_notes: Maya attended Arvind Jain's fireside on enterprise search. Solid pedigree (ex-Google search, Rubrik IPO). Met briefly at the reception — Arvind cordial but clearly oversubscribed on the Series C.

interactions.subject: Glean update — agents roadmap
interactions.raw_notes: TR Vishwanath sent a courtesy investor update. Highlighted upcoming agent platform and design partner program. Maya replied with congrats; no diligence opened (round closed).

interactions.author: devon@renegade.vc
interactions.raw_notes: Internal: Glean Series E announced at $4.6B. Horizontal enterprise SaaS — adjacent at best to Renegade thesis (we focus vertical workflow + dual-use industrials). Reference for AI-search comparables. Not a target.

interactions.author: maya@renegade.vc
interactions.raw_notes: Internal: Glean's no-code agent builder is the closest competitor to a Renegade portfolio company's agent platform. Surfacing for the platform review next month. Glean itself remains a pass on thesis-fit grounds (too horizontal, too late-stage).
